scripts.build: npm run build -w @filecel/r2 && npm run build -w @filecel/worker
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @filecel/r2 && npm run lint -w @filecel/worker
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @filecel/r2 && npm run typecheck -w @filecel/worker
scripts.test: npm run test -w @filecel/r2 && npm run test -w @filecel/worker
